---
name: Technical debt
about: Track structural improvements and maintainability work
title: "SIT-XXX: "
labels:
  - technical-debt
---

Reported by: unknown
Priority: P2
Affected surfaces: unknown
Risks if postponed: unknown

## Summary

Describe the structural problem in one concise paragraph.

## Current pain

Describe the current friction, hotspot, duplication, or fragility.

## Why now

Explain why this should be addressed in the current planning horizon.

## Target improvement

Describe the better state wanted after the work.

## Non-goals

Describe what this debt item should not expand into.

## Validation notes

Describe how you will know the debt was actually reduced.

## Notes

- Add references, related issues, or dependency notes when useful.
